hero.label: Saudi Event Management
hero.title: Event Management Company in
hero.subtitle: Saudi Event Management is a luxury event planner headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Since 2010, the company has executed over 250 elite events, specializing in royal weddings, corporate galas, and exhibition management across Jeddah, AlUla, and Dammam.
hero.h1En: Event Management Company  Saudi Arabia | Saudi Event Management

services.label: Capabilities
services.title: Specially Selected
services.subtitle: From royal weddings to corporate summits, we deliver unparalleled excellence across every category of event management.

items.title: Wedding Event Management
items.description: Saudi Arabia's foremost luxury wedding planner — crafting royal weddings, traditional Saudi ceremonies, and destination celebrations fully licensed by the General Entertainment Authority (GEA) and compliant with Ministry of Culture guidelines.
items.cta: Explore Luxury Wedding Planning in Riyadh

items.title: Corporate Event Planning
items.description: End-to-end corporate event management for Vision 2030-aligned business summits, AGMs, and gala dinners. We manage GEA permits, VIP protocols, and international delegation logistics across Riyadh's KAFD and Olaya District.

items.title: Exhibition Management
items.description: Full-service exhibition management at Riyadh Front, KAFD, and Jeddah Exhibition & Convention Centre. Spatial 3D booth design, multi-brand pavilion builds, and GEA-compliant show management for trade fairs and product launches.

items.title: Event Production Services
items.description: State-of-the-art AV infrastructure: LED wall systems, custom stage builds, 3D projection mapping, and dynamic lighting — aligned with NEOM-inspired immersive event standards for audiences from 50 to 5,000+.

items.title: Conference Management
items.description: Comprehensive conference management across the Kingdom — GEA permit procurement, international VIP logistics, simultaneous translation, and hybrid digital-physical delivery. Trusted by government ministries, Saudi Aramco, and NEOM teams.

items.title: Cultural & Seasonal Events
items.description: Bespoke Saudi seasonal activations, Riyadh Season extensions, and Vision 2030 cultural programming — GEA-sanctioned festivals and regional heritage events that connect global audiences with authentic Saudi identity.

cityPresence.label: Our Presence
cityPresence.title: Across the
cityPresence.subtitle: On-the-ground teams in every major Saudi city — with local vendor networks, GEA compliance, and deep knowledge of each region's event landscape.

cities.name: Riyadh
cities.title: Corporate & Government Events Hub
cities.description: Our founding city and primary operational base. From King Abdullah Financial District (KAFD) boardroom summits and Riyadh Season mega-activations to Olaya District gala dinners — we are embedded in the capital's most prestigious event ecosystem and trusted by government ministries, royal commissions, and Fortune 500 corporate delegations.

cities.name: Jeddah
cities.title: Red Sea Luxury & Cultural Events
cities.description: Jeddah's vibrant waterfront and cosmopolitan character make it Saudi Arabia's premier destination for luxury weddings, international trade exhibitions at Jeddah Exhibition & Convention Centre (JECC), and Red Sea Global-aligned sustainable event productions. We manage every aspect from Corniche waterfront galas to upscale Tahlia Street corporate receptions.

cities.name: AlUla
cities.title: UNESCO Heritage & Desert Luxury
cities.description: As a Royal Commission for AlUla (RCU) preferred event partner, we produce destination weddings, executive retreats, and cultural activations across Hegra, Sharaan Nature Reserve, and the iconic Maraya concert hall — Saudi Arabia's most breathtaking and internationally recognised event canvas, aligned with Vision 2030 tourism targets.

cities.name: Makkah
cities.title: VIP Spiritual & Ceremonial Events
cities.description: With absolute discretion and deep cultural understanding, we manage exclusive private gatherings, premium Hajj and Umrah season hospitality programmes, and high-value ceremonial receptions for government bodies, royal households, and international VIP delegations visiting the Holy City under Ministry of Hajj guidelines.

cities.name: Madinah
cities.title: Heritage & Cultural Activations
cities.description: Specialising in culturally respectful event production aligned with Madinah's spiritual and historical significance — bespoke heritage activations, intimate high-net-worth gatherings, and Vision 2030 religious tourism programming designed to connect international visitors with the profound legacy of the Prophet's City.

cities.name: Dammam
cities.title: Industrial, Energy & Corporate Expos
cities.description: The Eastern Province is Saudi Arabia's industrial and energy heartland. We organise Saudi Aramco supplier conferences, SABIC industry expos, and high-stakes corporate events at Dhahran Expo and across the Jubail Industrial City and Khobar business ecosystems — serving the Kingdom's most strategically important commercial region.

faq.label: Inquiries
faq.title: Curated
faq.conciergeDesc: Our priority concierge team is available 24/7 via WhatsApp for immediate white-glove assistance.

items.question: Do you handle events outside Saudi Arabia?
items.answer: Yes. We operate in UAE, Qatar, and internationally for destination events. Our Riyadh and Jeddah teams coordinate global logistics for seamless execution across borders.

items.question: What cities do you operate in?
items.answer: We have a strong operational presence across the Kingdom, including Riyadh, Jeddah, AlUla, Dammam, Makkah, and Madinah. We also travel internationally for bespoke projects.

items.question: How far in advance should we book your services?
items.answer: For luxury weddings and large-scale corporate galas, we recommend booking 9 to 12 months in advance. For exclusive private parties, 3 to 6 months is typically sufficient.

items.question: Do you offer destination event planning?
items.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in curating breathtaking destination weddings and events globally, managing all travel arrangements and local vendor sourcing.

items.question: What types of events do you specialize in?
items.answer: We specialize in luxury weddings, corporate summits, cultural activations, private VIP celebrations, and high-end seasonal events.

items.question: What is your minimum event budget?
items.answer: Our events start from SAR 25,000 for intimate private gatherings. For royal weddings and large corporate galas, budgets typically range from SAR 200,000 to SAR 2M+.

items.question: How do I get a quote?
items.answer: Submit your inquiry through our 'Book Now' form or contact us via WhatsApp. We typically provide a detailed initial proposal within 24 hours.

items.question: What is your cancellation policy?
items.answer: Each contract outlines specific terms based on the event scale. Generally, initial deposits are non-refundable within 30 days of the scheduled event date.

items.question: Is 15% VAT included in your prices?
items.answer: All prices are quoted exclusive of 15% Saudi VAT. A valid VAT registration number is provided on all official invoices.

items.question: Do you manage vendor contracts?
items.answer: Absolutely. We handle all vendor negotiations, contracts, payments, and on-day coordination so you don't have to manage multiple touchpoints.

items.question: Can you handle high-profile and VIP events?
items.answer: Yes. We specialize in absolute discretion for royal families, government officials, and celebrity clients. NDAs are standard for all our elite projects.

items.question: Do you offer day-of coordination only?
items.answer: We offer full-service planning, partial planning, and dedicated day-of coordination packages to suit your specific involvement level.

items.question: Can you arrange entertainment and performers?
items.answer: Yes. We have exclusive access to top Saudi and international performers, live orchestras, cultural acts, and world-class stage productions.

items.question: Do you handle all vendor communications?
items.answer: Yes, our comprehensive service includes complete vendor management, leveraging our exclusive network to ensure every element meets our rigorous standards.

founder.label: The Vision
founder.title: Crafting
founder.subtitle: Personalized Event Management
founder.bio1: With over a decade organizing and managing the world's most exclusive celebrations, our agency was founded by **Habiba Asghar** with a singular vision: to transform short, special times into memories that last forever, full of beauty and emotion.
founder.bio2: We bring an unparalleled eye for detail and a deep understanding of what makes an event truly unforgettable. Every celebration is treated as a unique work of art.
founder.bio3: Our philosophy is simple — every detail should feel intentional, effortlessly beautiful and deeply resonant with our clients' vision.
